column2: Prompt
column3: Response

column1: User Story 1: Teacher and Student Registration
column2:
User Story 1: Teacher and Student Registration
● As a teacher or student,
I want to register with an email and password,
So that I can access the system and participate in discussions.
column3:
Scenario: Teacher or student registers with email and password
  Given a user is on the registration page
  And the user is either a teacher or a student
  When the user registers with an email and password
  Then the user should be able to access the system
  And the user should be able to participate in discussions

column2:
User Story 2: Categorizing Users
● As an administrator,
I want to categorize users as either "teachers" or "students",
so that I can grant appropriate permissions to each type of user.
column3:
Scenario: Categorize users as teachers or students
  Given an administrator is logged into the system
  And there are users in the system
  When the administrator categorizes a user as a teacher
  Then the user should be granted teacher permissions
  And the user should be listed under the teachers category

column2:
User Story 3: Creating Discussion Rooms
● As a teacher,
I want to create discussion rooms with title, description, number of theses and due date,
So that I can organize and manage academic discussions efficiently.
column3:
Scenario: Teacher creates a discussion room
  Given a teacher is logged into the academic platform
  When the teacher creates a discussion room with a title, description, number of theses, and due date
  Then the discussion room should be created successfully
  And the teacher should see the new discussion room in the list of discussion rooms

column1: User Story 4: Add or Remove Students from the Room
column2:
User Story 4: Add or Remove Students from the Room
● As a teacher,
I want to be able to add or remove students from a discussion room at any time, so that I can maintain control and flexibility over the participants.
column3:
Scenario: Add a student to the discussion room
  Given a teacher is logged into the system
  And the teacher is viewing the discussion room
  When the teacher adds a student to the room
  Then the student should be listed as a participant in the room

column1: User Story 5: Adjusting Assignment Due Dates
column2:
User Story 5: Adjusting Assignment Due Dates
● As a teacher,
I want to adjust assignment due dates during the discussion,
so that I can ensure that the schedule is met and meets the
students' needs.
column3:
Scenario: Adjusting assignment due dates during discussion
  Given a teacher is in a discussion with students
  And an assignment due date needs adjustment
  When the teacher adjusts the assignment due date
  Then the schedule should be updated
  And the new due date should meet the students' needs

column2:
User Story 6: Visualize Participant Progress
● As a teacher,
I want to visualize the progress of each participant and reviewer,
so that I can track the development of theses and revisions in real time.
column3:
Scenario: Visualize participant and reviewer progress
  Given a teacher is logged into the system
  And participants and reviewers have submitted theses and revisions
  When the teacher views the progress dashboard
  Then the teacher should see the progress of each participant and reviewer in real time
  And the teacher should be able to track the development of theses and revisions

column1: User Story 7: Reports of Arguments and Revisions
column2:
User Story 7: Reports of Arguments and Revisions
● As a teacher,
I want to generate reports with the content of the arguments and revisions made,
so that I can analyze and archive the debate history.
column3:
Scenario: Generate report with arguments and revisions
  Given a teacher is logged into the debate platform
  And there are existing arguments and revisions in the debate history
  When the teacher requests to generate a report
  Then the report should include the content of the arguments and revisions
  And the report should be available for analysis and archiving

column2:
User Story 8: Track Student Interactions
● As a teacher,
I want to track student interactions, comments, and arguments,
so that I can ensure active participation and quality of discussion.
column3:
Scenario: Track student interactions for active participation
  Given a teacher is logged into the classroom management system
  And students are participating in a discussion
  When a student makes a comment or argument
  Then the interaction should be recorded in the system
  And the teacher should be able to view the recorded interactions

column2:
User Story 9: Ensuring Anonymity
● As a student,
I want my interactions and reviews to be anonymous,
So that I can participate in the discussion without being influenced by personal opinions.
column3:
Scenario: Student interactions and reviews are anonymous
  Given a student is logged into the discussion platform
  And the student is on the review submission page
  When the student submits a review
  Then the review should be posted anonymously
  And the student's identity should not be visible to other users

column1: User Story 10: Submitting Thesis and Revisions
column2:
User Story 10: Submitting Thesis and Revisions
● As a student,
I want to submit my thesis and the revisions assigned by the reviewers,
so that I can complete my participation in the debate according to the
schedule.
column3:
Scenario: Submitting thesis and revisions
  Given a student has completed their thesis
  And the reviewers have assigned revisions
  When the student submits the thesis and revisions
  Then the submission should be accepted
  And the student should be eligible to participate in the debate according to the schedule

column2:
User Story 11: Deadline Notifications
● As a student,
I want to receive notifications about thesis submission and review deadlines,
so that I can stay organized and turn in my assignments on time.
column3:
Scenario: Student receives notifications about thesis deadlines
  Given a student is registered in the thesis management system
  And the student has a thesis submission deadline
  When the deadline is approaching
  Then the student should receive a notification about the thesis submission deadline
  And the student should receive a notification about the thesis review deadline

column2:
User Story 12: Reviewer Reassignment
● As a system,
I want to automatically reassign reviewers in case of delays or
withdrawals,
so that I can ensure the discussion continues without interruptions.
column3:
Scenario: Automatically reassign reviewers in case of delays or withdrawals
  Given a review process is ongoing
  And a reviewer is delayed or withdraws
  When the system detects the delay or withdrawal
  Then the system reassigns the reviewer
  And the discussion continues without interruptions

column1: User Story 13: Accessing and Exporting Completed Discussions
column2:
User Story 13: Accessing and Exporting Completed Discussions
● As a teacher,
I want to access and export completed discussions in PDF or other format,
so that I can archive and review the content later.
column3:
Scenario: Teacher accesses and exports completed discussions
  Given a teacher is logged into the discussion platform
  And there are completed discussions available
  When the teacher selects a completed discussion to export
  Then the discussion should be available for export in PDF or other formats
  And the teacher should be able to download the exported discussion

column2:
User Story 14: Viewing Discussion History
● As a student,
I want to see the history of arguments after the debate has ended,
so that I can access the content discussed and improve my learning.
column3:
Scenario: Viewing discussion history after debate ends
  Given a student has participated in a debate
  And the debate has ended
  When the student views the discussion history
  Then the student should see the history of arguments
  And the student should be able to access the content discussed

column2:
User Story 15: Automatic Reviewer Assignment
● As a system,
I want to assign two random reviewers to each thesis,
So that the debate is fair and without conflicts of interest.
column3:
Scenario: Assign two random reviewers to each thesis
  Given a thesis is submitted
  When the system assigns reviewers
  Then two random reviewers should be assigned to the thesis
  And the assignment should ensure fairness and no conflicts of interest

column1: User Story 16: Submitting a Closing Argument
column2:
User Story 16: Submitting a Closing Argument
● As a student,
I want to submit a closing argument based on reviewers' feedback,
so that I can conclude the debate process with suggested improvements.
column3:
Scenario: Submitting a closing argument based on reviewers' feedback
  Given a student has received feedback from reviewers
  And the student has prepared a closing argument
  When the student submits the closing argument
  Then the closing argument should be submitted successfully
  And the student should see a confirmation message

column2:
User Story 1: User Registration
● User Story: As a user,
I want to register with an email and password,
So that I can access the TeseLab system.
column3:
Scenario: User registers with email and password
  Given a user is on the registration page
  When the user enters a valid email and password
  And the user submits the registration form
  Then the user should be registered successfully
  And the user should be able to access the TeseLab system

column2:
User Story 2: Creating Discussion Rooms
● User Story: As a teacher,
I want to create new discussion rooms,
so that I can start and manage discussions about dissertations.
column3:
Scenario: Teacher creates a new discussion room
  Given a teacher is logged into the system
  When the teacher creates a new discussion room
  Then the discussion room should be created successfully
  And the teacher should be able to manage the discussion room

column1: User Story 3: Add Students to the Room ● User Story: As a teacher,
column2:
User Story 3: Add Students to the Room ● User Story: As a teacher,
I want to add students to a discussion room,
so that I can include all the necessary participants in the discussion.
column3:
Scenario: Add students to a discussion room
  Given a teacher is logged into the system
  And the teacher is on the discussion room page
  When the teacher adds a student to the room
  Then the student should be listed as a participant in the discussion room
  And the student should receive a notification about being added to the room

column1: User Story 4: Removing Students from the Room
column2:
User Story 4: Removing Students from the Room
● User Story: As a teacher,
I want to remove students from a discussion room,
so that I can adjust the team composition as needed.
column3:
Scenario: Remove a student from the discussion room
  Given a teacher is logged into the system
  And a discussion room with students is open
  When the teacher removes a student from the room
  Then the student should no longer be in the discussion room
  And the team composition should be updated accordingly

column2:
User Story 5: Adjusting Deadlines
● User Story: As a teacher,
I want to adjust the deadlines for assignments,
so that I can ensure that discussions and reviews are completed within the appropriate time.
column3:
Scenario: Adjusting assignment deadlines
  Given a teacher is logged into the assignment management system
  And there are existing assignments with set deadlines
  When the teacher adjusts the deadline for an assignment
  Then the new deadline should be saved
  And students should be notified of the deadline change

column2:
User Story 6: Visualize Participant Progress
● User Story: As a teacher,
I want to visualize the progress of each participant and reviewer,
So that I can track the progress of discussions and interventions.
column3:
Scenario: Visualize participant progress
  Given a teacher is logged into the system
  And participants and reviewers are enrolled in a course
  When the teacher views the progress dashboard
  Then the teacher should see the progress of each participant and reviewer
  And the teacher should be able to track discussions and interventions

column2:
User Story 7: Generate Debate Reports
● User Story: As a teacher,
I want to generate reports with the content of the arguments and revisions made,
So that I can review and document the progress of the debates.
column3:
Scenario: Generate debate reports with arguments and revisions
  Given a teacher is logged into the debate platform
  And there are completed debates with arguments and revisions
  When the teacher requests to generate a report
  Then the report should include the content of the arguments
  And the report should include the revisions made

column2:
User Story 8: Submit Initial Pitch
● User Story: As a student,
I want to submit my initial pitch in the tab corresponding to my thesis,
so that I can begin the process of revising my thesis.
column3:
Scenario: Submit initial pitch for thesis
  Given a student is on the thesis submission page
  And the student has selected the tab corresponding to their thesis
  When the student submits their initial pitch
  Then the initial pitch should be recorded
  And the student should be notified that the pitch has been submitted successfully

column2:
User Story 9: Submit Revisions
● User Story: As a reviewer,
I want to submit my revisions on assigned theses,
so that I can provide feedback to the thesis author.
column3:
Scenario: Reviewer submits revisions on assigned theses
  Given a reviewer is logged into the review system
  And the reviewer has an assigned thesis to review
  When the reviewer submits their revisions
  Then the thesis author should receive the feedback
  And the thesis status should be updated to "Revised"

column2:
User Story 10: Plot Deadline Notification
● User Story: As a student,
I want to receive notifications about the deadlines for submissions of plots and revisions,
so that I can ensure that all assignments are completed on time.
column3:
Scenario: Student receives notification for plot submission deadline
  Given a student is enrolled in a course
  And the course has an upcoming plot submission deadline
  When the deadline is approaching
  Then the student should receive a notification about the plot submission deadline
  And the notification should include the submission date and time

column1: User Story 11: Ensure Anonymity in Interactions
column2:
User Story 11: Ensure Anonymity in Interactions
● User Story: As a student,
I want to ensure that all interactions between students are anonymous,
so that feedback and reviews are impartial and objective.
column3:
Scenario: Ensure anonymity in student interactions
  Given a student is logged into the feedback system
  And another student has submitted feedback
  When the first student views the feedback
  Then the feedback should not reveal the identity of the submitting student
  And the feedback should appear impartial and objective

column2:
User Story 12: Editing Closing Arguments
● User Story: As a student,
I want to edit and finalize my closing arguments after review,
so that I can improve my thesis based on the feedback I received.
column3:
Scenario: Student edits and finalizes closing arguments after review
  Given a student has received feedback on their thesis
  And the student has access to the thesis editing tool
  When the student edits the closing arguments based on the feedback
  Then the closing arguments should be updated in the thesis
  And the student should be able to finalize the thesis

column1: User Story 13: Checking for Missed Assignments
column2:
User Story 13: Checking for Missed Assignments
● User Story: As a teacher,
I want to check which students have not completed their assignments by the due date,
So that I can take appropriate action to ensure that all assignments are completed.
column3:
Scenario: Teacher checks for missed assignments
  Given a teacher is logged into the assignment management system
  And there are assignments with due dates that have passed
  When the teacher views the list of assignments
  Then the system should display a list of students who have not completed their assignments by the due date

column2:
User Story 14: Reviewer Reassignment
● User Story: As a student,
I want reviewer roles to be automatically reassigned in case of dropouts or lateness,
so that the review process can continue without interruption.
column3:
Scenario: Reassign reviewer roles automatically in case of dropouts or lateness
  Given a student is assigned a reviewer
  And the reviewer drops out or is late
  When the system detects the dropout or lateness
  Then the reviewer role should be automatically reassigned
  And the review process should continue without interruption

column2:
User Story 15: Accessing Discussion History
● User Story: As a student,
I want to access the discussion history and my arguments after the discussion has ended,
so that I can review previous feedback and contributions.
column3:
Scenario: Student accesses discussion history after discussion ends
  Given a student has participated in a discussion
  And the discussion has ended
  When the student accesses the discussion history
  Then the student should see their previous feedback
  And the student should see their contributions

column2:
User Story 1: User Registration
• User Story: As a teacher,
I want to register students and teachers with email and password,
So that all participants can access the system securely.
column3:
Scenario: Register a new student
  Given a teacher is logged into the system
  And the teacher has the student's email and password
  When the teacher registers the student
  Then the student should be able to access the system securely

column2:
User Story 2: Setting Permissions
• User Story: As an administrator (teacher),
I want to categorize users as either "teachers" or "students",
so that each user has permissions appropriate to their role in the system.
column3:
Scenario: Categorize users as teachers or students
  Given an administrator is logged into the system
  And there are users without assigned roles
  When the administrator categorizes a user as a teacher
  Then the user should have teacher permissions
  And the user should not have student permissions

column1: User Story 3: Creating Discussion Rooms • User Story: As a teacher,
column2:
User Story 3: Creating Discussion Rooms • User Story: As a teacher,
I want to create new discussion rooms,
so that I can organize academic discussions in a structured way.
column3:
Scenario: Teacher creates a new discussion room
  Given a teacher is logged into the academic platform
  And the teacher is on the discussion rooms page
  When the teacher creates a new discussion room
  Then the new discussion room should be listed on the discussion rooms page
  And the teacher should see a confirmation message

column1: User Story 4: Add Students to the Discussion Room
column2:
User Story 4: Add Students to the Discussion Room
• User Story: As a teacher,
I want to add or remove students from a room at any time,
so that I can manage who participates in the discussion.
column3:
Scenario: Add a student to the discussion room
  Given a teacher is logged into the system
  And a discussion room is created
  When the teacher adds a student to the discussion room
  Then the student should be listed as a participant in the discussion room

column2:
User Story 5: Adjusting Deadlines
• User Story: As a teacher,
I want to be able to adjust assignment deadlines at any time,
so that I can adapt the schedule as needed.
column3:
Scenario: Adjusting assignment deadlines
  Given a teacher is logged into the system
  And an assignment is available with a set deadline
  When the teacher adjusts the assignment deadline
  Then the new deadline should be saved
  And students should see the updated deadline

column2:
User Story 6: View Participant Progress
• User Story: As a teacher,
I want to view the progress of each participant and reviewer,
so that I can track participation and meeting deadlines.
column3:
Scenario: View progress of each participant and reviewer
  Given a teacher is logged into the system
  And participants and reviewers have submitted their work
  When the teacher views the progress report
  Then the teacher should see the progress of each participant
  And the teacher should see the progress of each reviewer

column2:
User Story 7: Review Reports
• User Story: As a teacher,
I want to generate reports with the content of the arguments and revisions
made,
so that I can review and archive the debate history.
column3:
Scenario: Generate and review debate history reports
  Given a teacher is logged into the system
  And the debate has arguments and revisions
  When the teacher generates a report
  Then the report should include the content of the arguments
  And the report should include the revisions made

column2:
User Story 8: Tracking Arguments
• User Story: As a teacher,
I want to track the interactions and comments made by students,
so that I can assess the quality of the ongoing debate.
column3:
Scenario: Track student interactions and comments
  Given a teacher is logged into the debate platform
  And students are participating in a debate
  When students make interactions and comments
  Then the teacher should see a log of all interactions and comments
  And the teacher should be able to assess the quality of the debate

column2:
User Story 9: Student Anonymity
• User Story: As a teacher,
I want to ensure that student identities are anonymous during
discussion,
so that the process is impartial.
column3:
Scenario: Ensure student identities are anonymous during discussion
  Given a discussion forum for students
  And students are participating in the discussion
  When a student posts a comment
  Then the student's identity should be anonymous
  And the comment should be visible to all participants

column2:
User Story 10: Exporting Completed Discussions
• User Story: As a teacher,
I want to export the content of completed discussions as a PDF,
so that I can archive or share the material.
column3:
Scenario: Export completed discussions as a PDF
  Given a teacher is logged into the discussion platform
  And there are completed discussions available
  When the teacher selects the option to export a completed discussion as a PDF
  Then the system generates a PDF of the selected discussion
  And the PDF is available for download

column2:
User Story 11: Automatic Dissertation Distribution
• User Story: As a student,
I want to automatically receive a dissertation for debate,
so that I can start participating.
column3:
Scenario: Automatic dissertation distribution for debate
  Given a student is registered in the debate system
  When the student requests a dissertation for debate
  Then the student should automatically receive a dissertation
  And the student can start participating in the debate

column1: User Story 12: Assign Reviewers                                                                                                     • User Story: As a student,
column2:
User Story 12: Assign Reviewers                                                                                                     • User Story: As a student,
I want two reviewers to be randomly assigned to review my thesis,
so that I can receive impartial feedback from peers.
column3:
Scenario: Assign two random reviewers to a student's thesis
  Given a student has submitted a thesis for review
  When the system assigns reviewers
  Then two reviewers should be randomly assigned to the thesis
  And the reviewers should be impartial peers

column2:
User Story 13: Reviewer Reassignment
• User Story: As a student,
I want reviewers to be automatically reassigned in case of lateness or abandonment,
so that the discussion is not derailed by unexpected events.
column3:
Scenario: Automatic reassignment of reviewers due to lateness or abandonment
  Given a student has submitted an assignment
  And the assigned reviewer has not provided feedback within the expected timeframe
  When the system detects the reviewer's lateness or abandonment
  Then the system reassigns the assignment to a new reviewer
  And the student is notified of the reassignment

column2:
User Story 14: Deadline Notifications
• User Story: As a student,
I want to be notified about submission deadlines for arguments and
reviews,
so that I can meet the deadlines.
column3:
Scenario: Notify student about submission deadlines
  Given a student is enrolled in a course
  And the student has upcoming submission deadlines for arguments and reviews
  When the deadline is approaching
  Then the student should receive a notification about the submission deadline
  And the notification should include the deadline date and time

column2:
User Story 15: Submitting Initial Argumentation
• User Story: As a student,
I want to submit my initial argument for the received thesis,
so that I can contribute to the debate.
column3:
Scenario: Submitting initial argument for received thesis
  Given a student has received a thesis
  When the student submits their initial argument
  Then the initial argument should be recorded
  And the student should be able to contribute to the debate

column2:
User Story 16: Reviewing Assigned Theses
• User Story: As a reviewer (student),
I want to submit reviews for the theses that have been assigned to me,
So that the author can improve his/her work based on my feedback.
column3:
Scenario: Reviewer submits a review for an assigned thesis
  Given a reviewer has been assigned a thesis
  And the reviewer has logged into the review system
  When the reviewer submits a review for the thesis
  Then the review should be recorded in the system
  And the author should be notified of the new review

column2:
User Story 17: Anonymity in Interactions
• User Story: As a student,
I want my interactions with other participants to be anonymous,
so that the discussion can be impartial and free from personal bias.
column3:
Scenario: Ensure anonymity in student interactions
  Given a student is participating in a discussion
  And the discussion platform supports anonymous interactions
  When the student posts a comment
  Then the comment should be displayed anonymously
  And other participants should not see the student's identity

column1: User Story 18: Final Argument with Feedback
column2:
User Story 18: Final Argument with Feedback
• User Story: As a student,
I want to submit my final argument considering the feedback from the
reviewers,
so that I can improve my thesis before the debate closes.
column3:
Scenario: Submit final argument with feedback
  Given a student has received feedback from reviewers
  And the debate is still open
  When the student submits the final argument
  Then the final argument should be considered for the thesis
  And the thesis should be improved before the debate closes

column1: User Story 19: Reassign Reviewers Due to Withdrawals
column2:
User Story 19: Reassign Reviewers Due to Withdrawals
• User Story: As a student,
I want reviewer roles to be automatically reassigned if
any reviewer withdraws or misses the deadline,
so that my thesis receives proper review without delays.
column3:
Scenario: Automatically reassign reviewers if a reviewer withdraws or misses the deadline
  Given a student has submitted a thesis for review
  And reviewers have been assigned to the thesis
  When a reviewer withdraws or misses the deadline
  Then the reviewer role should be automatically reassigned
  And the thesis should receive proper review without delays

column1: User Story 20: Accessing Discussion History                                                                                   • User Story: As a student,
column2:
User Story 20: Accessing Discussion History                                                                                   • User Story: As a student,
I want to access the discussion history after it has ended,
so that I can review my contributions and those of my peers.
column3:
Scenario: Accessing discussion history after it has ended
  Given a student has participated in a discussion
  And the discussion has ended
  When the student accesses the discussion history
  Then the student should see their contributions
  And the student should see the contributions of their peers

column2:
User Story 1: Register
Description: As a user, I want to be able to register on the platform so that I can use all the system's features.
column3:
Scenario: User registers on the platform
  Given a user is on the registration page
  When the user submits valid registration details
  Then the user should be registered successfully
  And the user should be able to access all system features

column1: User Story 2: Logging Into the System
column2:
User Story 2: Logging Into the System
Description: As a user, I want to be able to log into the system using
my credentials to access my account.
column3:
Scenario: User logs into the system with valid credentials
  Given the user is on the login page
  And the user has valid credentials
  When the user enters their credentials and clicks the login button
  Then the user should be redirected to their account dashboard
  And the user should see a welcome message

column2:
User Story 3: Recover Password
Description: As a user, I want to be able to recover my password if I forget it, so I can continue using the system.
column3:
Scenario: Recover forgotten password
  Given a user is on the login page
  And the user has forgotten their password
  When the user clicks on the "Forgot Password" link
  Then the user should be redirected to the password recovery page
  And the user should be prompted to enter their registered email address

column2:
User Story 4: Update Profile
Description: As a user, I want to be able to update my profile, including name and email, to keep my data up to date.
column3:
Scenario: User updates profile with new name and email
  Given a user is logged into their account
  And the user is on the profile update page
  When the user updates their name and email
  Then the profile should be updated with the new name and email
  And a confirmation message should be displayed

column2:
User Story 5: Create Discussion Room
Description: As a user, I want to be able to create a discussion room with a title, description, theses, and deadlines, so that participants can debate.
column3:
Scenario: User creates a discussion room
  Given a user is logged in
  When the user creates a discussion room with a title, description, theses, and deadlines
  Then the discussion room should be created successfully
  And participants should be able to debate in the room

column1: User Story 6: Joining a Discussion Room
column2:
User Story 6: Joining a Discussion Room
Description: As a user, I want to be able to join an existing discussion room
using an alphanumeric code, so that I can contribute to the
discussion.
column3:
Scenario: User joins an existing discussion room using a code
  Given a user has an alphanumeric code for a discussion room
  When the user enters the code to join the discussion room
  Then the user should be added to the discussion room
  And the user should be able to contribute to the discussion

column2:
User Story 7: Start Debate Round
Description: As a moderator, I want to be able to start the debate round when there are at least 3 participants, so that the debate can begin.
column3:
Scenario: Moderator starts debate round with sufficient participants
  Given there are at least 3 participants
  When the moderator starts the debate round
  Then the debate should begin

column2:
User Story 8: Submit Initial Pitch
Description: As a participant, I want to be able to submit my initial pitch
for each thesis so that reviewers can evaluate it.
column3:
Scenario: Submit initial pitch for thesis
  Given a participant is logged into the system
  And the participant has selected a thesis topic
  When the participant submits the initial pitch
  Then the pitch should be saved in the system
  And the reviewers should be notified of the new pitch

column2:
User Story 9: Reviewing Theses
Description: As a reviewer, I want to be able to review theses assigned to me and provide critical feedback to help improve my colleagues' arguments.
column3:
Scenario: Reviewer provides feedback on assigned thesis
  Given a reviewer is logged into the review system
  And the reviewer has an assigned thesis to review
  When the reviewer submits feedback on the thesis
  Then the feedback should be saved in the system
  And the thesis status should be updated to "Reviewed"

column2:
User Story 10: Adjusting Activity Deadlines
Description: As a moderator, I want to be able to adjust activity deadlines at any time to ensure that the discussion continues to flow.
column3:
Scenario: Moderator adjusts activity deadlines
  Given a moderator is logged into the system
  And there is an ongoing activity with a set deadline
  When the moderator changes the activity deadline
  Then the new deadline should be saved
  And the participants should be notified of the deadline change

column1: User Story 11: Sending Replies to Reviews
column2:
User Story 11: Sending Replies to Reviews
Description: As a participant, I want to be able to send replies to reviewers after receiving their feedback, to justify my argument.
column3:
Scenario: Participant sends a reply to a review
  Given a participant has received feedback on their submission
  And the participant is logged into the system
  When the participant sends a reply to the review
  Then the reply should be visible to the reviewer
  And the reply should be saved in the system

column1: User Story 12: Exporting a Completed Discussion
column2:
User Story 12: Exporting a Completed Discussion
Description: As a moderator, I want to be able to export the contents of a completed debate in PDF format, to archive or share the results.
column3:
Scenario: Exporting a completed discussion in PDF format
  Given a completed debate exists
  And the user is a moderator
  When the moderator exports the debate
  Then the debate should be saved as a PDF file
  And the PDF file should be available for download
